content_body: Five friends and myself came to this cabin for a retreat. The words we could use to describe our experience include: awesome, breathtaking, and relaxing. The cabin exceeded our expectations. It is a beautiful structure surrounded by God's beautiful nature. We will share this experience with others and plan to come again. This cabin allowed us to bond as friends, laugh and cry together, and create memories we will talk about for years to come.
title: Awesome, Breathtaking, and Relaxing
